name: agentic_dev
_comment: Agentic development-team preset — ontology (piece 1 of the solution pack). POST to /ontology with LIGHTRAG-WORKSPACE set. Object/link vocabulary is user data; core stays generic. Grounded in dsivov/ai_development_team.

object_types.name: Role
object_types.description: An agent role / principal in the team (manager, architect, developer, integrator, devop, production-engineer). The set is preset data, not core.

object_types.name: Discussion
object_types.description: A design/analysis discussion thread — the origin of decisions.

object_types.name: Decision
object_types.description: An architectural/technical decision (ADR) — the irrecoverable 'why'. The crown jewel.

object_types.name: Feature
object_types.description: A feature / PRD — a unit of product intent.

object_types.name: ChangeRequest
object_types.description: A change request — created by the manager, analyzed by the architect.

object_types.name: Task
object_types.description: A unit of work with a lifecycle state (see the lifecycle preset piece).

object_types.name: Module
object_types.description: A code module / component. Fed from a structural index (tree-sitter), not parsed by CG.

object_types.name: API
object_types.description: A public interface exposed by a module — the anchor of the 'don't rebuild it' check.

object_types.name: Commit
object_types.description: A git commit — evidence that closes a task. Thin rc; the 'why' lives on the decision it implements.

object_types.name: Skill
object_types.description: A capability a role carries and applies to a module.

link_types.name: motivates
link_types.description: A decision motivates features and tasks.

link_types.name: supersedes
link_types.description: A change request supersedes prior decisions.

link_types.name: closed_by
link_types.description: A task is closed by commits.

link_types.name: assigned_to
link_types.description: A task is assigned to a role.

link_types.name: reuses
link_types.description: A task reuses an existing API instead of rebuilding it.

link_types.name: depends_on
link_types.description: A module depends on other modules.

link_types.name: owns
link_types.description: A role owns modules (basis for ReBAC ownership grants).
